summary: Tested frontend CSS fixes for text visibility in results page - verified Tailwind CSS variables and specific color overrides for path cards and secteur badges are correctly implemented

testing_limitations.issue: Unable to complete full end-to-end questionnaire flow due to browser automation timeout
testing_limitations.impact: Could not verify actual rendered colors on final results page
testing_limitations.workaround: CSS code analysis confirms correct implementation

verified_fixes.fix: Card background (--card: 0 0% 100%) and foreground (--card-foreground: 222 47% 11%) correctly set for white background with dark text
Line 2772-2775: .path-result-card h3 has 'color: #1f2937 !important;' for dark text visibility
Line 2797-2801: .secteurs-badges .badge has 'color: #1f2937 !important;' for dark text visibility

passed_tests: Questionnaire starts correctly after date input
CSS variables correctly set in index.css
Specific color overrides implemented in App.css
Path card title color override verified (rgb(31, 41, 55))
